'''pakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ghostishly|ghostishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-k-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ghostishly|ghostishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pakate|pakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pakatesher|pakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakatesherĂ«m|pakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pakatero|pakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pakateshĂ«|pakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakateshĂ«m|pakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipakatero|gokipakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipakateshĂ«|gokipakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipakateshĂ«m|gokipakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopakankerom|gopakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopakankeshĂ«|gopakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopakankeshĂ«m|gopakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopakankeya|gopakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pakaterom|pakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakatemu|pakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pakateya|pakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipakaterom|gokipakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipakatemu|gokipakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipakateya|gokipakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pakakate|pakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pakakatesher|pakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakakatesherĂ«m|pakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pakakatero|pakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pakakateshĂ«|pakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakakateshĂ«m|pakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipakakatero|gokipakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipakakateshĂ«|gokipakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipakakateshĂ«m|gokipakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopakakankerom|gopakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopakakankeshĂ«|gopakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopakakankeshĂ«m|gopakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopakakankeya|gopakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pakakaterom|pakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pakakatemu|pakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pakakateya|pakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipakakaterom|gokipakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipakakatemu|gokipakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipakakateya|gokipakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠte|pĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠtesher|pĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠtero|pĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠtero|gokipĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠtemu|pĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠkĂŠteya|pĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠterom|gokipĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠkĂŠteya|gokipĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafkafte|pafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafkaftesher|pafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafkaftesherĂ«m|pafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafkaftero|pafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafkafteshĂ«|pafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafkafteshĂ«m|pafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafkaftero|gokipafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafkafteshĂ«|gokipafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafkafteshĂ«m|gokipafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafkafnkerom|gopafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafkafnkeshĂ«|gopafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafkafnkeshĂ«m|gopafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafkafnkeya|gopafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafkafterom|pafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafkaftemu|pafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafkafteya|pafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafkafterom|gokipafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafkaftemu|gokipafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafkafteya|gokipafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
